channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd April
item.description:
Fly tipping as normal in this area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 192, Maple Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping branches in the highway, 3rd April
item.description:
Fly tipping branches and ivy in highway, has been there over 1week
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Essenden Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement grass verge Willesden lane at Athelstan gardens, 3rd April
item.description:
This rubbish has beeen here for more than 2 weeks. The entire grass run should be cleaned properly. Brent are clearly not bothering to clean their streets as compared to Camden, Westminster and Kensington all of which are within a mile of this area. Times are tough for all of us but but this is your responsibility and I pay you to do this not to ignore it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Abondoned van for 6+ days in loading bay, 3rd April
item.description:
The van has been left here for about a week, with a parking fine. Reg nr points to a “white Mercedes” but this van is dark gray.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rivington Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park area kids, 3rd April
item.description:
Park area very rundown pathways full of weeds and slippery would be nice for someone to take some care in a job they’re doing as I have the background myself and this would be someone’s job to clear the pathway is clear. We little bit regularly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellingham Green, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 3rd April
item.description:
Bridge at Footscray high street heavily littered and bags of waste thrown over bridge landed on large pipes stinks of food waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foots Cray High Street, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds litter, 3rd April
item.description:
Weeds litter all over pathway and park area over flowing bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellingham Green, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Carter Street, 3rd April
item.description:
Significant amount of litter surrounding bins on Carter Street, environmental health hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carter Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light has no guard, 3rd April
item.description:
Street light has no shade or guard . Lamppost has no code , corner of lawn road by bollards junction of lawn road Copers cope road Ref no 9188138 Br3 1pq is the nearest post code I can give If engineer still can’t locate happy fir him to knock at 9 Wrotham house , Sellindge close Copers cope road beckenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lawn Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches needing pruned, 3rd April
item.description:
Free branches hitting multiple phone words and overhanging garden

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carisbrooke Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carter street bins, 3rd April
item.description:
Shopping trolley and litter surrounding Carter Street bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carter Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing bins, 3rd April
item.description:
Litter scattered all around park area bins left to over flow

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellingham Green, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter/rubbish, 3rd April
item.description:
The path through Great Bartletts Wood linking Wickham Lane with Winns Common is a disgusting mess of litter from top to bottom that includes alcohol and drug paraphernalia. Needs addressing urgently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grosmont Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter on street as usual, 3rd April
item.description:
Residents throwing rubbish without bags being tied. Attracting pests. Rubbish is flowing all along pavement. Pavement is narrow and so much rubbish. Very common sight in front of number 5 which looks like an illegal property with excessive number of people

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 3rd April
item.description:
There is a dead fox in the middle of the pathway. It’s on the public crossing that is on north end road in front of bridge road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 3rd April
item.description:
Flytipping of household waste outside number 4 Isla Road following departure of tennant

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Isla Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van parked no permit or parking ticket and has scratched car it parked next to trying to fit into small gap, 3rd April
item.description:
Van parked for over 2 hours illegally

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Joubert Street, Clapham Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The curb at the intersection of Tottenham Court Road and New Oxford Street, 3rd April
item.description:
The newly paved curb at this intersection is uneven. This was just paved over last week yet the length from the street to the curb is uneven in places and the tar is visibly uneven, hence causing me to fall and fracture two fingers on my right hand. The photographs attached prove this. I have more photos to show if needed and I can show yourselves in person as I live one block away. I tripped and fell on this uneven piece and fractured two of my fingers on March 24th so I had to go to A&E, hopefully damage, and pain, are not permanent. Photo has been attached but I am not sure it will go through your system as it looks like there is an error message in the attachment. please contact me if there is an error. timbaros at yahoo.com thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 279, Tottenham Court Road, Covent Garden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 47 Westbere Road, 3rd April
item.description:
Every time a heavy vehicle passes by, the entire house shakes. We are worried about the long term damage this is going to cause to the structure of our house. We have recently moved into this house but have been told that the situation worsened when the speed bumps were added to the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Westbere Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street name sign painted over, 3rd April
item.description:
This sign has been painted over for quite some time now.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Federation Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet
